cTWAS report

Darren Cameron

2025-12-15

cTWAS pipeline steps

We used cTWAS to integrate our sc-eQTL data with neuropsychiatric GWAS data to identify putative candidate genes associated with these conditions. The citation for cTWAS is Zhao et al. (2025), DOI: 10.1038/s41588-023-01648-9.

  1. create_ld_matrices: Create (1000G hg38 build) LD matrices and variant info files for cTWAS
  2. copy_fusion_weights: Copy genuine FUSION weight files (cTWAS chokes if any empty files are in weight dir)
  3. run_ctwas: Run cTWAS on sc-eQTL and GWAS data
  4. run_ctwas_multi: Run multi-group cTWAS all cell types per GWAS
  5. ctwas_report: Generate cTWAS report

TODO:

  1. Just showing multi for now. Can add individual runs again later
  2. Add gene / region for plot(s) for interesting genes

Correction

Endo-Peri 17224
MG 17197
InN-1 17167
RG-3 17152
RG 16757
ExN-DL 16415
ExN-UL 15699
Unique across all cell types 19647
Genes were defined as cis-regulated if at least one variant showed nominal association with expression (TensorQTL nominal P < 0.01). The final row reports the union of genes across all cell types and defines the Bonferroni correction denominator for causal TWAS analyses.
